'''yagama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swampbuster|swampbuster]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swampbuster|swampbuster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yagama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yægæmæth|yægæmæth]] || [[word:yægæmæj|yægæmæj]] || [[word:yægæmæsh|yægæmæsh]] || [[word:yægæmæ|yægæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yagagamath|yagagamath]] || [[word:yagagamaj|yagagamaj]] || [[word:yagagamash|yagagamash]] || [[word:yagagama|yagagama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yagamath|yagamath]] || [[word:yagamaj|yagamaj]] || [[word:yagamash|yagamash]] || [[word:yagama|yagama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yagafmath|yagafmath]] || [[word:yagafmaj|yagafmaj]] || [[word:yagafmash|yagafmash]] || [[word:yagafmaf|yagafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yagamatha|yagamatha]] || [[word:yagamaja|yagamaja]] || [[word:yagamasha|yagamasha]] || [[word:yagamaka|yagamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yagamath|yagamath]] || [[word:yagamaj|yagamaj]] || [[word:yagamash|yagamash]] || [[word:yagama|yagama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yagamathal|yagamathal]] || [[word:yagamajal|yagamajal]] || [[word:yagamashal|yagamashal]] || [[word:yagamakal|yagamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yagamathatha|yagamathatha]] || [[word:yagamajaja|yagamajaja]] || [[word:yagamashasha|yagamashasha]] || [[word:yagamaka|yagamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yagamathan|yagamathan]] || [[word:yagamajan|yagamajan]] || [[word:yagamashan|yagamashan]] || [[word:yagamakan|yagamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yagamathaoro|yagamathaoro]] || [[word:yagamajaoro|yagamajaoro]] || [[word:yagamashaoro|yagamashaoro]] || [[word:yagamakaoro|yagamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
